mapper.select: select from clicks order by count DESC
mapper.insert: insert into clicks (id, card_id, count, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{count,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into clicks
id, card_id, count, created_at, updated_at,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{count,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: SELECT a.card_id as cardId, b.title as cardTitle, b.sidebar_id as sidebarId, d.label as sidebarLabel, c.name as category, favicon as favicon, count as count FROM clicks a left join cards b on a.card_id = b.id left join category c on b.category_id = c.id left join sidebar d on b.sidebar_id = d.id ORDER BY count DESC limit 5
